warmup_on_boot.label: Warm up MuseTalk on JarvYZ startup
warmup_on_boot.description: Pipes the boot 'Ready.' utterance through the wrapper to preload CUDA kernels + mmcv lazy ops. Adds ~2s to first user utterance latency when off.

active_ref.label: Active reference
active_ref.description: Filename of the reference image/video used by the wrapper. Persisted across JarvYZ restarts (re-applied to wrapper at boot).
